# tutorial of the virtual environment manager: poetry
- list all available command
```{bash}
poetry env list
```

- list all dependencies
```{bash}
poetry show
```

- specify the python executalbe
```{bash}
poetry env use
```

- activate the shell
```{bash}
poetry shell
```

- run the script(no need to activate the shell)
```{bash}
poetry run python {your_scripy.py}
```
